latin: Adulescens falsam chartam identitatis ostendit. in ea solum unum nomen scriptum erat: 'McLovin.' amici eius clamaverunt: 'cur nomen unum tantum elegisti?'

questions.prompt: What was wrong with the ID card?
questions.target: It had only one name on it
choices: It had only one name on it

translation: A teenager showed a fake identification card. On it only one name was written: 'McLovin.' His friends shouted: 'Why did you choose only one name?'
